summary: Completed testing of MAX AGGRESSION DRIP and PHONE BLOWER features. All 10 test cases passed. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI fully functional.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (59 leads in queue, 53 clients tagged 'New Lead')
context_for_next_testing_agent: MAX AGGRESSION DRIP and PHONE BLOWER features are fully implemented and working. Phone Blower has 59 leads in queue. Disposition logging updates client status and triggers cooldown. Twilio SMS and Voice are MOCKED.

max_aggression_drip.100_message_templates: PASS - template_bank contains 100 short aggressive messages
max_aggression_drip.appears_in_bulk_dialog: PASS - MAX AGGRESSION DRIP visible in Bulk Templated Campaign dialog

phone_blower.page_loads_at_route: PASS - /phone-blower route loads PHONE BLOWER page
phone_blower.sidebar_entry: PASS - PHONE BLOWER appears in sidebar under Automation section with 'New' badge
phone_blower.analytics_bar: PASS - Analytics bar shows Attempts, Connects, No Answer, Voicemails, Interested, Connect Rate
phone_blower.lead_profile: PASS - GET /api/phone-blower/lead/{clientId} returns full profile with compliance checks
phone_blower.compliance_guardrails: PASS - Shows Call Window, Weekday, DNC Status, Opt-Out, Cooldown, Daily Limit
phone_blower.disposition_buttons: PASS - 13 disposition buttons work and update lead status
phone_blower.call_logging: PASS - POST /api/phone-blower/call logs disposition and updates client
phone_blower.cooldown_enforcement: PASS - After disposition, cooldown becomes Active and CALL NOW becomes BLOCKED

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - Messages stored but not sent

api_verification.GET /api/campaigns/prebuilt: 200 OK - Returns 5 prebuilt campaigns including max_aggression
